name: Obsidian-Otto Bridge
description: Expose the Obsidian-Otto control plane and official Obsidian desktop actions as OpenClaw tools.

repoRoot.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian-Otto repository. Defaults to the plugin's grandparent directory.

pythonCommand.description: Python executable to use for running the Otto CLI. Defaults to the repo virtualenv when present.

obsidianCommand.description: Obsidian desktop CLI command. Defaults to obsidian.

defaultTimeoutSeconds.description: Default timeout for otto_repo and obsidian_desktop commands.

defaultVault.description: Default Obsidian vault name or id for URI actions.
